instructions_to_main_agent: Implement this blueprint across the React Native (Expo) app and web preview. Prioritize reducing visual fatigue, establishing strict 8pt grid discipline, and utilizing the provided color palette, typography scale, and tactical component styling.

rules: No mixed scales. Stick strictly to this hierarchy.
Use font weights strategically: Light (300) for elegance, ExtraBold (800) for active HUD metrics.
Reduce #F97316 saturation for large areas; use it strictly for primary actions, active route lines, or vital alerts.
Never use pure black or pure white for large surfaces. Base background is a deep slate (#0A0D14).
HUD must be monochrome primarily, using the primary brand color sparingly to highlight the very next action.
Enforce strict 8pt grid (8, 16, 24, 32) across all padding, margins, and heights.
Containers with borders must have internal padding (e.g., p-4 or p-6).

glassmorphism.use_case: Floating Map Action Buttons, Sticky Headers, Modal Overlays

noise_texture.style: Apply a subtle CSS/SVG grain overlay at 3-5% opacity over the base background to reduce flatness.

map_action_bar.solution: Consolidate into a single 'Cockpit Control Pillar' on the right edge or bottom center using glassmorphism. Group related actions (Zoom, Layer, Optimize) and hide secondary actions behind a 'More' menu.
map_action_bar.styling: Glassmorphism, rounded-pill, icons only with tooltips.

sidebar_stop_cards.solution: Go flat. Tactical Minimalism. Remove shadows completely. Use 1px border. Consolidate badges into a single status indicator (dot or subtle left border color). Hide chevron until hovered or selected.

driving_hud.solution: Monochrome mode. High contrast white text on Deep Slate background. Use #F97316 ONLY for the exact next turn direction/distance. Make metrics (ETA, Speed) text-secondary.
driving_hud.styling: Extra bold mono numbers, high contrast, stripped of decorative colors.

history_modal_cards.solution: Use tinting. Instead of bright red/green backgrounds, use the surface background with a 1px colored left border or a colored dot. Keep the text text-primary.

algorithm_picker.solution: Replace emojis with technical, minimalist SVG icons (Lucide/Phosphor). Align names and descriptions in a strict grid.
algorithm_picker.styling: Lucide icons, text-secondary descriptions, 1px active border when selected.

modals.solution: Implement spring-based slide-up animations. Modals should feel like they have physical weight.
modals.styling: Framer Motion / Reanimated: type 'spring', damping 25, stiffness 200, slide from bottom.

easings.spring: Spring physics for modal entry, stop completion

micro_interactions.stop_completion: Strike-through text animation + checkmark scale pop + success haptic feedback.
micro_interactions.route_optimize: Sequential glow along the route polyline.

iconography.reasoning: Ionicons feels dated and inconsistent for a 'pro' tool. Lucide offers precise, customizable stroke widths (set to 1.5px or 2px) that match the 'Tactical Dashboard' aesthetic perfectly.
rules: Icon size standard: 20px for inline, 24px for primary actions.

login_hero_motif.description: Abstract parabolic curved lines glowing in neon green and cyan blue over a deep dark slate obsidian background, minimalist tech routing motif.
login_hero_motif.usage: Use as the background or hero image for the login / waitlist screen, overlaying the form with glassmorphism.

implementation_order.task: Global Design Tokens: Inject color palette, typography scales, and 8pt grid constants into the Expo Router theme.
Icon Migration: Replace Ionicons with Lucide throughout the codebase.
Sidebar & Stop Cards Cleanup: Strip shadows, borders, and extra badges. Apply tactical flat styling.
Map Action Bar Consolidation: Group the 4-corner floating buttons into a single glassmorphic pill or side dock.
Driving HUD Redesign: Convert to monochrome layout with single-accent orange for next action.
Modals & Overlays: Refactor Algorithm Picker, History, and Stop Details to use the new slide-up spring animations and remove rainbow pills.
